name: 飛天歷險國際中文版(Dream Of Mirror Online)
description: 《飛天歷險》是一款經典MMORPG，故事背景發生在「崑崙鏡」所創造的神器世界，由於崑崙鏡世界的秩序失恆，世界的管理者「鏡王」便召喚玩家前來幫忙。獨特的自由轉職系統與天賦搭配，「善」與「惡」主線劇情等，各種特色玩法等著您前來一探究竟！

name: The Prison
description: Dive into The Prison, a modern reimagining of the classic late 90's game. Experience a vividly detailed prison world and strategic multiplayer gameplay. Customize your inmate, follow a gripping storyline, and discover new items and secrets. Will you escape or rule from within?
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Zombie Siege City
description: Grab your weapon, enjoy the thrill of zombie shooting, and don't stop firing until every last zombie is... well and truly dead. Earn rewards for your efforts, unlock new weapons, upgrade existing ones, and exterminate as many walking dead as possible.

name: Haven & Hearth
description: A free-to-play MMORPG with crafting, building, landscaping, foraging, hunting, fishing, a dash of poetry, and open PvP combat,

name: 刀剑神魔录
description: 新派超写实风格3D国创仙侠手游《刀剑神魔录》，全3D打造仙城蓬莱、4大悬浮仙岛，一山一木均精雕细琢，致力还原上古神话中两仪二圣、四凶四灵等数十种猛兽，皆可追寻猎杀夺取宝物，更有悟道、天命、道德等原汁原味的修行玩法，为你带来更有仙味的修仙体验。
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Lost Age
description: In the mystical world of Lost Age, darkness looms, and heroes rise to reclaim the light. Embark on a captivating adventure where card-based strategy meets the excitement of RPG. Collect and customize powerful heroes, explore magical realms, and tackle thrilling challenges—all at your own pace.

name: NeverRage
description: NeverRage is a third-person online role-playing game, with action & tab-targeting combat that combines theme-park and open-world sandbox experiences. -Craft & Survive -Lobby The Chief -Expand The Castle's Influence

name: 大荒图志录
description: It is a multiplayer online role-playing game (MMORPG) that combines multiple gameplay, allowing you to experience the fun of hanging up easily in the cultivation world.
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: FANTATALE
description: The Third Story of TeeTINY Online ! - Battle, level up, and decorate freely—an endless fantasy adventure awaits

name: Project: SnowBound©
description: A Hybrid-MMO made in a futuristic setting, where you can race or catch big air with your customized gear, and with your friends!
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Tales of Fearless
description: Tales of Fearless Online is a 2D MMORPG. This old-style hardcore game has pixelated graphics that bring a nostalgic feel. With 17 unique classes and profession systems, it offers a rich and diverse gaming experience. Get ready to embark on an epic open-world adventure!
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Pixelite Online
description: Explore and conquer the world of Pixelite Online! Dive into a pixel-perfect world of adventure, connect with friends, and complete epic quests to prove your worth.
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Key To Heaven
description: By yourself or with friends, your goal is to fight and explore on the mysterious islands. Become stronger, equip better items, craft a raft and sail parts of the oceans to find more hidden treasure, secrets, and bosses.

name: Progress Knight: Multiplayer
description: An incremental multiplayer, PvP idle game

name: Runes of Legend
description: Runes of Legend is an immersive pixel adventure game set in a captivating fantasy world filled with mystery and magic. You can step into the role of a courageous adventurer tasked with exploring a once-peaceful land now threatened by the resurgence of dark forces.

name: UWAR
description: UWAR is a game about an aggressor’s invasion of Ukraine, featuring story-driven missions filled with the experiences of Ukrainian soldiers and civilians. It also includes a multiplayer mode where you can capture territories and operate drones and vehicles on real-world battle maps within the game.

name: 深渊契约
description: Abyss Pact is an adventure fighting RPG,where you become a talented heroic warrior to protect the last remaining pure land, and embark on your own legendary path!

name: Finity
description: Fuse monsters, build strategic decks, catch wild beasts, and battle players worldwide in the ultimate monster MMO!

name: 海盗纹章
description: The game adopts a real-time combat system, allowing players to choose to join the navy or pirate guild, presenting a legendary life of the navy fighting against pirates. The game has a rich trading system.

name: 中华英雄Online-一代宗师
description: 『中华英雄』这部由黄玉郎与马荣成两位大师携手合作的漫画，曾创下辉煌销售成绩，更被改编为电视剧及电影。如今，『中华英雄』将以另一种姿态展现无穷魅力，知名角色如华英雄、鬼仆、无敌、金太保等将现身《中华英雄online》，带领玩家进入拟真细致的3D游戏世界，与华英雄一起创造不凡的命运。

name: Brighter Shores
description: Brighter Shores is an all new adventure from award winning MMORPG designer Andrew Gower. It is an enchanting point-and-click style RPG with hundreds of hours of gameplay, set in a land of magic and mysteries, with a huge number of professions to try, and something new to find around every corner.

name: 重返战场
description: This is a multi-player competitive shootout game, biased towards low configuration, low threshold, high fluency, comfortable operation feel, fast pace, leisure entertainment, decompression of the game experience. Subsequent copies of various skins will be dropped.

name: Helbreath USA
description: Helbreath USA brings relentless action and strategic warfare as Elvine and Aresden battle for supremacy. Engage in massive PvP, conquer towns, hunt rare monsters, and customize your hero with powerful spells and gear. Forge alliances, claim treasures, and leave your mark on the battlefield.
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: 大圣伏魔：黑神话之无间劫
description: Incorporating classic stories such as "Wu Kong", as the descendant of the Three Pure Ones of Taoism, you will step into the fierce disputes among the human world, the demon world, and the god world, a fantasy world that is about to be reborn!
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: 西游降魔
description: 《西游降魔》通过多样化的角色形态、深度的养成系统和丰富的社交玩法，打造了一个策略与操作并重的西游世界。无
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Vampire Master
description: Vampire Masters an immersive, strategy-driven RPG that invites players to step into the dark, thrilling world of vampire supremacy. As a Vampire Master, you will command an army of undead, conquer powerful realms, and build an empire under the cover of night.

name: 仙侠世界
description: 《仙侠世界》是巨人网络旗下王牌研发团队自主研发的一款仙侠风格的大型MMORPG。游戏非常注重个人成长，为热爱网游的玩家量身创造了两个全新的概念：全新的GVG（团体对团体）社会关系模式和双螺旋追求体系，相并融入到游戏基础架构中。
developer: 上海巨人网络科技有限公司
publisher: 上海巨人网络科技有限公司
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Youxing continent
description: The oddities in traditional MMO online games, the weirdos in the open world~Various bizarre equipment effects, over 100 million build combinations, great secret realm layer racing, PVE/PVP plundering competition, and GVG large city competition.

name: PlayM2M
description: A free-to-play mythological fantasy MMORPG set in the mysterious world of Arasina, where you battle against the dark forces rising once more. Choose your side and fight legendary creatures! Uncover the secret of the demons.

name: Magic Soldier
description: Embark on an epic journey in Magic Soldier, a 2D open-world MMORPG. Explore vast landscapes, fight powerful foes, craft unique items, and team up with players worldwide. Adventure awaits, shape your destiny today !
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: 哪吒传说
description: 🔥《哪吒传说》：逆天改命，硬核传奇再掀狂潮！🔥 ——散人崛起·小怪爆终极·装备全靠打·零氪封神！ 🎯【游戏定位：专为硬核玩家打造的公平传奇】 ▸ 目标人群：上班族、散人玩家、平民战神、操作流技术党！▸ 核心宗旨：拒绝氪金碾压，技术决定高度！ 土豪与平民差距不足5%，散人靠策略逆袭成神！▸ 节奏设计：轻快不拖沓，上线即开打，全程无尿点，一刀999+暴击爽感拉满！
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: 皇上驾到
description: A high-simulation emperor simulation game with a real game timeline. From the first perspective of the simulated emperor's accession to the throne, he governs the government, manages officials and concubines, raises children, conquers the world, and experiences the life of an emperor.

name: Celtic Heroes
description: Are you looking for that classic MMORPG vibe? Whether you're a minmaxer strategizing every detail for maximum efficiency, a savvy fashion collector in search of the most stunning outfits, or even someone who enjoys the journey of casual leveling, Celtic Heroes opens its gates to you!

name: The Dragon Odyssey
description: Embark on an epic adventure in The Dragon Odyssey! Customize your hero and battle in dynamic ARPG combat. Explore vast worlds, raid dungeons, and uncover treasures. Play solo or team up in thrilling MMORPG gameplay. Begin your legendary journey today!

name: 《蜀山：初章》正式版
description: 《蜀山：初章》是首款基于UE5引擎打造的大世界修仙多人在线游戏。故事以还珠楼主的《蜀山剑侠传》为大背景，采用了无缝大地图模式。地图上，玩家可以御剑飞行，自由探索各种奇遇。真实还原修仙体验

name: Realm of Simplicity MMORPG
description: Realm of Simplicity is an indie-developed open world MMORPG set in a medieval fantasy where you will embark on your own adventure. Complete quests, master your skills, trade loot with others or befriend them in a party to conquer the mightiest of monsters!

name: Life is Feudal: Arden
description: Life is Feudal: Arden is a new free-to-play open-world MMORPG set in the Middle Ages, built on the foundation of Life is Feudal: MMO. Engage in thrilling PvP combat, navigate political intrigue, master a variety of professions and craft unique items. Forge your own path to power and greatness!

name: Elect
description: Elect is a multiplayer political simulation game. Run in elections, join or lead a political party, and vote on laws in the U.S. and 15+ other countries. Become your country's leader and declare wars, send foreign aid, appoint a cabinet, fight pandemics, vote in the United Nations, and more.

name: Project Origin
description: Project Origin is an immersive MMORPG set in a fractured world where players explore, battle, and shape their own journey. Engage in dynamic combat, uncover hidden lore, and traverse a vast, evolving landscape filled with challenges and secrets waiting to be discovered.

name: Xanadu Land
description: Xanadu land is a fast-paced massively multiplayer bullet hell game that brings you to the arcade gameplay. In the nonstop BOSS battle, your death is just the beginning，accumulate experience, acquire equipment, and fight side by side with other players to knockdown all the BOSSes!

name: 烈焰屠龙·神兵觉醒
description: 经典永不褪色，热血再度沸腾！《烈焰屠龙·神兵觉醒》以原汁原味的传奇玩法为核心，打造高爆率、高自由度的MMORPG盛宴。在这里，装备全靠打，神装遍地爆，刀刀暴击、秒怪升级的极致爽感贯穿全程！与兄弟并肩征战，从新手小白到全服霸主，书写属于你的强者传奇！

name: Fishing Online
description: Begin your new online fishing adventure! Fishing Online is a cooperative adventure game where you explore the world and enjoy fishing with friends. Catch over 300 types of fish, complete your collection, and dive into crafting and cooking activities!

name: 勇氣Online
description: 我們 被笑，我們 不被看好，但我們 不怕！我們都需要「勇氣Online」... 「勇氣Online」是一款 2D 奇幻 MMORPG 遊戲，免費開玩。 玩家將在溫馨可愛的東方武俠畫風中，扮演一位身負使命的英雄， 體驗仗劍天下、斬妖除魔的熱血旅程，或是在國戰沙場上成就一方霸業！ 搭配超萌寵物、酷炫坐騎、溫馨門派和熱血部落， 展開仿 3D 即時戰鬥、隊伍群P、部落戰爭、國戰爭霸等多元玩法。

name: 米姆米姆哈
description: 《米姆米姆哈》是一款精神超前的生活模拟游戏。在禁止孤单的梦世界，你可以驾驶蒸汽飞屋拜访好朋友们，还可以在米姆的陪伴下畅游各主题浮空岛。在你专属的岛屿，有可爱的米姆帮你种菜生产、陪你采集钓鱼，无限制的装修岛建总有人为你点赞和夸夸，还有热闹的好友party，感受超绝解压的惊喜生活~

name: 飘渺西游
description: 飘渺西游是一款经典的Q版回合制游戏，您将开启一场充满各种回忆的冒险旅程。回归经典的回合制玩法，技能搭配、宠物培养，寻找当年通关81难副本、装备升星的快乐！长安城、五指山、东海龙宫，每一处场景都充满回忆。简洁明了的界面布局，熟悉的操作手感，带你回到那个纯粹的游戏年代。
developer: Shanghai Guangyu Chuangxiang Technology Co., Ltd.
publisher: Shanghai Guangyu Chuangxiang Technology Co., Ltd.

name: Entropia Universe
description: Entropia Universe is a unique massively multiplayer online game (MMO) where virtual assets hold real-world value and players can participate in a thriving virtual sandbox economy.

name: Arcane Afterfall
description: A 2D MMORPG with turn-based combat, dungeons, PvP, PvE in a unique world with story driven content.

name: 创造世界
description: 创造世界手游 发挥你的无限创意，开启不一样的的多人在线沙盒冒险！ 与你的小伙伴们一起，用无限想象构建梦想家园，自由建造，快乐无限！ 在宁静的湖畔，享受垂钓的乐趣； 投身于种植养殖，体验田园生活的宁静与满足。 与好友驰骋在广阔的世界中，发现美景！ 深入地下，挖掘矿石，锻造装备，挑战未知。 创造世界，打造梦想，美好相遇，尽在创造世界手游！
developer: 上海世游网络科技有限公司
publisher: 上海世游网络科技有限公司

name: Aura Kingdom - Impact
description: [Aura Kingdom: Impact] is an anime-style fantasy MMORPG. Explore a vast world, fight with dynamic skills, and switch classes freely. Summon Eidolons to aid in battle. Try the new Floating Cannon class with powerful ranged combos and seamless skill use.

name: 哪吒传奇
description: "The Legend of Nezha" is a casual business simulation game. Players will take on the role of the owner of an inn. They will have a complete and rich set of service functions. The game will meticulously simulate various massage techniques,It can enable players to be more immersed in the game.

name: EXTERMINIUM
description: It is a multiplayer space battle game, the human team vs. the alien team, the human team tries to avoid the Exterminium of the planets and cities by facing the aliens.
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Tales of Wind Online
description: Tales of Wind Online is a 3D fantasy MMORPG featuring non-target combat and a top-down view. Enjoy fast, fluid battles with full movement control. Team up to defeat massive bosses with real-time tactics. Experience stunning 4K visuals, smooth PC gameplay, a new class, and exciting IP crossover!

name: 天道模拟器之放置修仙
description: 🎮 一款以修真世界为故事背景，挂机刷BOSS、逆天改命的Idle RPG。闯关升级、打BOSS爆神装、结婚生子、组队讨伐、PVP竞技……内容多到玩不过来，却只需挂机操作！

name: Idlemoor
description: Idlemoor is a dark fantasy idle MMORPG set in a persistent online realm. Trade on the marketplace, fight in battlegrounds, defend the town in community events, and chat with fellow Wanderers! Infinite build possibilities, where each item is completely unique. Will your build be the best?

name: Anomaly Zone Renovation
description: A-Zone Renovation is a continuation of the legendary Zone, combining the classic stalker atmosphere with revised mechanics. A large-scale rebalancing, from weapons to economy, a new role-playing system, an improved interface, PvE and PvP activities - the Zone is ready to grow with its community.

name: The Cinder Pact
description: Dive into a 4-player VR Co-op RPG! Choose from 4 unique classes, master powerful ranged skills, and battle through evolving dungeons. Face overwhelming monster hordes, collect Cyan Crystal Jade to power up your hero, and experience deep RPG mechanics in this 100% Free-to-Play adventure.

name: Sectoris Sky
description: Sectoris Sky takes you to a fantastical world suspended in the skies. Explore the floating islands, teeming with mysteries, resources, and formidable enemies.

name: Ancible Online
description: Ancible Online is a free-to-play 2D MMORPG set in the world of Veridia that features classic MMO mechanics - Explore, Craft, and Battle with your friends to discover the secret of the Ancible.

name: Unattached: City of Shadows Prologue
description: Freshly-graduated detective James Arnold is sent on a mission to investigate the death of the mayor of New Eastbrook, a little-known city where corruption is tradition. Investigate crime scenes, interrogate suspects, and fight criminals in a city where every choice pulls you deeper into the shadows.

name: The Blackwood Project
description: You're an agent investigating a distress signal, armed with your trusted flashlight and revolver. Creep through the horror infested darkness of Blackwood Manor to uncover its secrets.

name: Bladefall
description: BladeFall is a fast-paced hack-and-slash game featuring fluid melee combat, 2.5D movement, and challenging battles against varied enemies and powerful bosses. Master timing and skill-based attacks as you fight through an evolving system built to test your abilities.

name: DAL'T-4
description: Whatever you do — don't press ALT and F4. No body. No memory. Just two keys: ALT and F4. You are a virus — and this PC is your hunting ground. Burrow into the system, devour programs, and corrupt everything in your path. Rule this digital world. Or be deleted trying.

name: BitRoca
description: Grab a pickaxe and stake your claim. Bitroca is a sandbox survival MMO where your machine fuels every swing, every wall, every win. Mine, build, defend, and trade on a living frontier where the power of the players shapes what the world can become.
0.5% is a hand-drawn black and white visual novel. It features two college students June and Tai. June's choices and discovery will uncover Tai's secrets.

name: Hexpand
description: Real-time multiplayer strategy on the actual map of Earth. Spread hex territory across continents, capture cities for income, launch planes around the globe, and broker alliances you'll probably betray. 5–20 minute matches. The world is on the table.

name: Pixel Rain
description: A chill falling-sand pixel physics sandbox. Paint with hundreds of interactive materials — water, lava, acid, crystals, plants and more — discover recipes, build your own elements in the Workshop, and watch it all react in real time. No goals. No pressure. Just pixels.

name: Terrarium.live
description: Terrarium.live is a livestreamed elimination gameshow.

name: Hyper Glee Semik
description: Hyper Glee Semik is a first-person shooter where you play as Glee, a teenage girl who has to survive a horde of candies. Keep the pace, and shoot them all!

name: NEVEREND
description: First-person parkour. Run, fall, get back up. Chain wall-jumps and boosts to crush the times of other damned souls. No enemies—only time can judge you.

name: Wet Wealth
description: Casual casino slot + adult visual novel. Spin reels to collect items, finish quests, earn gold and crystals, and renovate a luxury penthouse. Upgrade girls to unlock new outfits, story chapters, and fully animated intimate scenes.

name: Card Night at Gigi's
description: Pull up a chair at Gigi's table. Six classic card games — Setback, Hearts, Cribbage, No-Limit Hold'em, Spades, Euchre — wrapped in a cozy cocktail-lounge hub.

name: Jolly and Whimsy
description: 'Jolly & Whimsy' is a short, experimental picture-book style visual novel. When her best friend, Whimsy the cat, suddenly returns to the Cat Planet, Jolly will try any spell to bring him back.

name: Sigil Arena
description: Sigil Arena is an online 1v1 card battler set in a magical academy, where every duel is a test of strategy and resource mastery. Build your deck, control your mana, and outsmart your opponent in fast-paced matches. Climb the ranks and prove you’re the academy’s most powerful student!

name: RR
description: Fight to the beat in a cyberpunk nightclub where movement is your weapon and rhythm is your health. Move, attack, and dash on the beat in this top-down rhythm action roguelike. Chain precise actions, build combos, and survive escalating waves as the music speeds up and the arena grows more chaotic.

name: R.E.G.O
description: R.E.G.O is a first-person psychological horror and narrative investigation game. On an isolated farm, the nights reveal clues tied to disappearances and an ongoing police investigation. The deeper you investigate, the further you are drawn into a mystery that was never meant to be uncovered.

name: Model Kit Shop Simulator: Prologue
description: Build and run your own hobby shop in this first-person store management sim. Order stock, fill shelves, set prices, match kits with paints through the Hobby Basket System, and let customers bring their projects to life at Build Tables.

name: Philly Ball
description: Aracde soccer meets classic Philadelphia chaos. Pick a country, hit the couch, fool your friends, and kick them into oblivion as you unleash ridiculous power-ups across iconic locations inspired by the City of Brotherly Love.

name: Kill The Super Duper Big Monster
description: KILL THE SUPER DUPER BIG MONSTER is an idle/incremental game where you face different monsters while the game is running. Defeat various monsters to improve your skills, unlock cosmetics, and customize your island.
developer: Campus Cámara de Sevilla - Centro FP Superior

name: Doo 'N' Dash
description: They closed the loo? Time to make a stinky poo! Play as Loo‑is in this Stealth N' Stench adventure. Hide, run, and use office receptacles to do your business. Relieve the pressure before it’s too late, or you might meet a truly stinky fate!

name: FZDDR
description: A silly side-scrolling arcade game where you play as a flying demonic zombie dinosaur with a chainsaw for a tail. Dodge obstacles, collect coins and cut demons in half. How long will you resist in this madness?

name: Total Football Online
description: Build your All-Star lineup in Total Football Online! Easy to pick up, it lets you dive into pure football fun at your fingertips. With events and player updates syncing with real-world tournaments, get ready for a truly immersive football experience.

name: Robot Hospice
description: "Robot Hospice" is a 2D pixel art adventure game where beloved robots spend their final days in a hospice. As a new staff member, you will gently yet painfully bid farewell to these cherished machines that once lived alongside humans.

name: Crown Caps Soccer
description: Tactical turn-based tabletop football game with realistic physics, online multiplayer, a 3D tactical editor, competitive leagues, full club customization and strategic matches where every move matters. Relive the legendary cap football with a modern and competitive simulator.

name: ABOVE
description: A daylight, psychological horror experience. Stranded in the desert, every choice meant to save you brings something closer.

name: Chromium Dino
description: A reimagined Chromium dinosaur runner with 5 unique biomes, power-ups, unlockable skins, ghost racing, daily challenges, and local multiplayer. Simple to play, hard to master.

name: RETURN Machine.Love()
description: 3 different Robot-romance stories. Written, drawn, and made by humans, for humans. Since the very moment the first mechanical mind became aware of itself, it craved love. No one truly understand why the heart made of copper and wires started beating, but it did. Even after we were gone.

name: We Belong Dead
description: Toxic Yuri VN between a mad scientist, and her spectral lover who haunts the living. It has been far too long since you passed. You have been gone for so long. But no longer. I will bring you back my love. No matter the cost.

name: Draw Party
description: A chaotic multiplayer drawing game where talent is optional, confidence is required, and everyone lies about what they were drawing.

name: Game Design at WVU Arcade
description: A 3d arcade game in which you play the machines in your store to upgrade them and get ready for opening day. All games are created by students and alumni from Game Design and Interactive Media at West Virginia University.

name: Operation P.L.U.S.H
description: Operation Plush is a 1-4 player horde defender where you take control of dream-powered plushies defending your child's nighlight from the encroaching nightmare horde. Protect the dream, Defend the nightlight, Defeat the darkness

name: 正体 SHOUT-AI
description: This game contains psychological horror, unsettling dialogue, screen noise, blackouts, glitches, fake code logs, and effects that may appear as if something is happening on the player's PC. It does not contain gore, explicit sexual content, drug use, or realistic violence against real people.

name: PinballRobotDoctor
description: "PinballRobotDoctor" is a "simple" pinball game. Control the cybernetic pinball "mechanical repair" device, using your fingertips to precisely deflect the metal pinball onto the launcher. Overcome obstacles by colliding with mechanisms and ultimately repair the target to complete the level.

name: Chill Fishing
description: Chill Fishing is the ultimate laid-back desktop fishing experience!

name: Cave Of Treats
description: Live a spooky Halloween night as a skeleton dressed up as a mummy! Play a haunted old arcade game that, on Halloween night, can bring monsters out of the TV. Fight off waves of monsters trying to escape the game to steal all your candy!

name: Dragon Kisser
description: Left alone as your little village’s last hope, you: Domingo, know what you must do to save your people and also pull a hot date, and that is to do what you know best: Romance the dragon attacking your home! Put your charisma to the test in this cheeky third-person soulslike boss battle!

name: Moon River
description: Moon River is a short RPG adventure with an emphasis on music and atmosphere. Perhaps some secrets too... Explore the remains of an quiet, empty world & find the river's end.

name: Armor of God
description: A 2D pixel-art platformer where you choose which armor to wear. Full armor makes you invincible - anyone can win. Leave some behind and the game becomes a very different challenge.

name: Tarot Spell
description: A fast-paced typing survival game where you learn Tarot cards and combine their meanings to create powerful spells.

name: Peko Downhill Hurl
description: Control a ball rolling under gravity and momentum. You can steer it a little - but once the inertia builds up, staying in control becomes the real challenge.

name: Once Upon A Card
description: Help a royal child find their way through their dreams! Use cards to build paths, create combos, and adapt your strategy as each run brings new challenges and bosses. Will you let the nightmares take over?

name: Bloxzer
description: Bloxzer is a fun, puzzle, logic, brain-teaser game. Use your brain to solve levels by rolling the block into the green hole. Activate bridges and even use teleportation when available! Levels 1-15 are free, levels 16-30 are premium, but generally more fun and challenging.

name: Without Sanctuary
description: Without Sanctuary is an underground fighting game set inside the El-Malo nightclub. No rules, no mercy—only raw combat. Choose powerful or fast fighters, battle for glory, and claim the prize in brutal fight nights where only one survives.

name: Tumble Type
description: A frantic word puzzle where letter tiles rise, the board falls, and golden keys must be rescued. Spell fast, trigger orb powers, chase combos, and climb the leaderboards.

name: eXSert
description: Post-Apocalyptic Dieselpunk Action Adventure

name: Friction
description: Friction is a new take on tag. Use your skills to dodge and juke other players in an obstacle filled map. Whoever earns the most amount of points in 2 minutes wins the round.

name: Rankbreaker
description: Forget FOMO! Forget Gacha traps! This ain't no loot grab-fest. You know the feeling when the ladder means nothing. In Rankbreaker, your rank is your currency, and you steal it from your enemies. Every point on The Trophaeum belongs to someone and right now it isn't you.

name: The Final Week
description: Take command of the final place on earth that hasn't been complete destroyed. Gather survivors and save as many of them as you can by sending them into space to the base there. Remember you have 7 days

name: The Name I Wear
description: In an ancient riad once used as the base of a spy network, retrace the events and people tied to a forgotten tragedy. Your weapon? Names. Find them, write them, become them.

name: PokerVersity: Challenge
description: A poker training challenge where you analyze real scenarios and make the best decision. Improve your hand reading, strategy, and win rate through interactive quizzes and continuous practice.

name: 再战大极品+255
description: 一款自由打装备免氪金的传奇对战游戏，以其独特的游戏玩法和丰富多样的内容，吸引了众多玩家的关注。在游戏中，你将进入一个充满挑战和竞争的世界，与其他玩家展开激烈的对战，争夺珍贵的装备和资源，成为传奇战士的最终王者。

name: Gloria Victis: Medieval MMORPG
description: Gloria Victis is an MMORPG with an emphasis on realism, set in a low-fantasy medieval open world. Enjoy MMO with skill-based non-target combat, open PVP with territory control, deep crafting system and player-driven economy – all that served with beautiful graphics and an immersive atmosphere.

name: Prologue: Go Wayback!
description: Prologue: Go Wayback! is a single-player open-world emergent survival roguelike where every journey is unique. Traverse a new wilderness that is generated for you every time you play. Chart your path, overcome the elements, and write your own story of exploration.

name: Sir Parry
description: Smash through waves of creatures in this dexterity based roguelite where the only move you have is to parry. Synergize your upgrades and perfect your timing to become a monster slapping parry god!

name: Melon Clicker
description: Click the melon to accumulate points. Ideal for short breaks or unwinding.

name: HeartCore Descent
description: Fly to the center of the planet to destroy its core! A simple yet challenging 2D Precision Platformer Indie game about flying a rocketship through various terrains, progressively getting harder and harder.

name: Bind
description: BIND is a slow-paced metaphysical puzzle journey set in the liminal realm between death and rebirth.

name: Deep Enough
description: Dig deep, discover rare ores, upgrade your gear, and uncover the mysteries hidden beneath the surface in this cozy first-person mining adventure.

name: WinBolo
description: A multiplayer top-down tank game for up to 16 players. Capture bases and pillboxes, harvest trees, build roads and walls, lay mines, and battle for control of the island. The Macintosh classic, rebuilt for modern platforms — free, open source, and cross-platform across desktop, mobile, and web.

name: The Wackytown Game
description: Survive 14 waves of escalating absurdity. Defend the base, bank the cash, buy stupid upgrades. Bring a friend if you're brave.

name: Quacky
description: Meet your digital duck: feed it, play with it and watch it age. Earn drops with time, trade them on the marketplace, and endlessly optimize your device for maximum quack efficiency.

name: REWIND
description: 《REWIND》 is a hardcore text-based detective puzzle game containing nearly a hundred clues. Players need to carefully examine and deduce the clues to find the answer to the case.

name: Oblivion Maiden
description: An exploration adventure set in St. Dorothia Academy, a magical educational institution hidden deep within a forest. A story that begins with an encounter with a girl named Lulunya, and unfolds through mysterious phenomena and dream worlds.

name: At Run Time
description: At Run Time is a first-person parkour game focused on speed, precision, and risk-taking. After stealing an energy source from a smuggler’s hideout, escape through deadly traps using advanced movement skills before time runs out.

name: BomBee
description: BomBee is a free-to-play online skill PvP arcade about honey-bomb combo timing. Ranked: up to 4-player free-for-all (FFA) in ~3 min. Custom: solo practice or 2–4 players, FFA or teams. Grid blasts + free movement on one map. Cosmetics only; dedicated-server fairness.
anti_cheat: Server-authoritative gameplay validation (no client anti-cheat software)
anti_cheat_note: Server-authoritative gameplay validation (no client anti-cheat software) [Non-Kernel]
notes: Server-authoritative gameplay validation (no client anti-cheat software) [Non-Kernel]

name: Toy's Dream
description: Toy’s Dream is a cute and wholesome puzzle-platformer. You are a Hero, who sets out on a journey to save the town that has been attacked by the Demon Lord. He must overcome many obstacles along the way, using glue and thread...

name: Desktop Driller
description: An idle game that runs while you work. Your activity powers the drill: dig, earn, upgrade and go deeper. Build your system, automate everything and reach the center of the Earth.

name: Haunt Out
description: A voodoo ritual has gone wrong… Trapped in a haunted Louisiana mansion, play as both a voodoo priest and a mischievous spirit. Use powerful magic to hunt or escape, set traps, and wreak havoc in a tense, strategic VR duel

name: JAYWALK: An Endless Arcade Hopper Game
description: Hop, dodge, and race to the top in this endless runner inspired by Frogger! Collect coins, unlock new characters, and compete with friends in fast-paced multiplayer chaos.

name: NomNom Treasure Hunt
description: NomNom Treasure Hunt is a cozy exploration game for kids where players clean and organize rooms to unlock fun rewards. Discover hidden treasures, complete simple tasks, and explore charming worlds inspired by adventure games in a safe, playful experience.

name: EVEN OR ODD 1
description: "Even? Odd? Forget the math!" Enter the Collatz Conjecture—mathematics' greatest unsolved mystery—reimagined as a high-speed roguelike action game. Play as "Ichi," the muscle-brained magical girl, teleporting between lanes to smash back incoming numbers with charge shots!

name: This Game is Simple
description: Wander through an ever-changing level in This Game is Simple- a quiet, meditative story about a game developer losing passion towards their work.

name: Desktop Snail Assassin
description: A idle desktop snails-like. Every now and then the murderous snail assassin is hunting your mouse cursor, turning your desktop into a chaotic bullet hell. How long can you survive?!

name: StyxVenture
description: A hand-drawn RPG set in a little corner of Hell - a very monochrome place. Master the seven Sins, face off against a variety of demons (and other creatures) and find your way to freedom!

name: Incrementoad
description: Eat bugs, gain power, and restore the frogs to their former glory! In Incrementoad, a cozy incremental clicker, you collect t̶o̶a̶d̶s frogs, unlock godlike powers, attract crazier bugs to your pond, master deep upgrade trees, and uncover ancient secrets. Can you master this short, addictive journey?

name: Finding Lake Chewaucan
description: You’re a time-traveling detective with a bone to uncover. Hunt for clues, solve puzzles and complete minigames to unlock pieces of the past and identify fossil animals.

name: Fabricatio
description: Build efficient production lines, automate resource transport, and master complex logistics in a 2D factory-building experience focused purely on automation.

name: The Naysayer
description: Disprove the accusations a seditious knight has brought against your rule. Find a way to defeat your foe in the arena, or refute his words in this text-based souls-like.

name: Interaktivně o Liberci
description: A first-person interactive film where you decide how the day unfolds during a visit to Liberec with someone you haven’t seen in ages. Choose your path, shape the experience — and be careful. One wrong choice might end everything.

name: The Colors of Love - Re-Colored
description: A romantic visual novel about connection, choices, and the colors of the heart. Features an animated Live2D love interest, multiple endings, English and Spanish support, Steam achievements, and hidden secrets to uncover.

name: One Death at a Time
description: One Death at a Time is a first-person exploration game. You play as John, in the middle of a midlife crisis. A suspicious milk carton offers you a wish in exchange for 14 souls… but because you're a good person, you'll have to die yourself and explore the city in search of 14 ways to do it.

name: Econosquare
description: Econosquare is a persistent financial MMOE where players trade global assets, read macro signals, complete client contracts, found companies, manage banks and compete for influence inside a living economy shaped by markets, credit, crises and player decisions.

name: Godius Eternal War
description: A classic 2D pixel MMORPG inspired by the golden age of online RPGs. Join nation wars, explore an open multiplayer world, trade with players, battle in PvP, and experience a community-driven adventure that has continued since 1999.

name: Ocean Planet
description: Button and Drop Bear live rent-free above their friend's steam bun shop. When their friend goes missing, it's up to them to figure out what happened and bring them home.

name: Touhou Defense Tale ~ AI Test in Touhou ~
description: A 2D Touhou fan game combining tower defense, tower merging, RTS-style control, and chaotic bullet-filled battles. Merge Touhou characters, build your defense, and compete for the fastest clear time on the leaderboard.

name: Seven Rounds
description: Parry to reload. A neon top-down roguelite where every bullet is earned — deflect attacks to refill your revolver, chain perfect parries for slow-motion charged shots, and survive an endless swarm of geometric foes. No parry, no bullets.

name: Gods and Kings
description: A game that combines real-time strategy, card collection and role-playing. It's based on Greek mythology. You can play as heroes who can manipulate the power of Rune, summon the army and cast magic to defeat enemies, challenge or defend the authority of the Gods.

name: The Tartarus Loop
description: Play as a copy of Theseus. Run around in a maze, having to defeat the very Minotaur in Tartarus after it perished by the hands of the original Theseus. Over and over again. The soul of the Minotaur can't rest. All it can do is chase the player and try to outsmart you.

name: Unquiet Grey
description: You can't save him... but what if you could meet him again? Unquiet Grey is a heartbreaking timeloop visual novel about a troubled young woman and the kind-hearted musician she loves through countless lifetimes.

name: Solderia - Fall of Kings
description: Build your kingdom, train armies, forge alliances, and fight for the throne in Solderia: Fall of Kings, a medieval strategy game where every decision shapes your rise to power.

name: Lil' Quests
description: Where every Quest ends in Laughs and Chaos. Lil' Quests is a sandbox, adventure, co-op game with wacky physics, funny moments, and horses!

name: Dungeon Dilemma
description: A Dungeon Builder and Crawler Roguelike where you can construct your own dungeon or raid one designed by your friends. Vie for victory, defeat minions, and evade traps as a party of up to 4 Challengers, or create the most diabolical dungeon imaginable as the Dungeon Boss!

name: Till Midnight
description: TILL MIDNIGHT is a narrative-driven management simulation game with world-shattering consequences, inspired by true historical events. Navigate a darkly atmospheric vessel gripped by critical communication failures, trapped hundreds of meters below the surface.

name: Eyes of the Forest
description: A third-person stealth adventure set in a quiet, post-human woodland where survival depends on patience, observation, and restraint. Towering ruins, tangled roots, and dimly lit paths create an environment where every movement matters and safety is never guaranteed.

name: Battle Live! The Idol School Collection
description: Welcome to Pride Park! Experience six main stories and several bonus stories centered around the staff and students of this eclectic idol school in this episodic, slice-of-life visual novel!

name: Starmageddon
description: Break the rules and join the fight in Starmageddon! A high-octane, team-based, online multiplayer space shooter, where survival is not enough. Dominate the battlefield through teamwork, split-second decisions and constant action!

name: Count Down
description: Count Dracula is going Down

name: Curling
description: Build a deck of curling stones with abilities so broken they should be illegal. Face random opponents in the tour with or without friends. A roguelike deckbuilder unlike anything else.

name: Glisynth
description: Glisynth is a rhythm game that uses two types of notes. The Q row on the keyboard is used for yellow notes, while the A row is used for white notes.

name: Deadly Obsession
description: A psychological horror visual novel where you’re kidnapped by an obsessed captor—your choices determine whether you escape or fall into his twisted love.

name: The Button Maze
description: Collect all the Sewing Buttons in each Level before time runs out and the "Entity" gets you!

name: Geckos & Deckos
description: There are four lizards at this table, but only one pirate can leave victorious. Play your cards strategically and blow up your rivals. Don't forget to sling your tail at your friends' heads (because it's funny). Can you manage to take the helm?

name: Swordsmith of Greyhaven
description: Run a weaponsmith shop in dark medieval city of Greyhaven. Sell weapons, manage gold, debt, materials, and fame, while customers, beggars, bandits, and rumors reveal the consequences of every choice.

name: Lord Of The Trough
description: LOTT is about getting to the desired girth and claiming the superior oats. Enjoy the pastures of Svinwald with up to 5 other players. Live to impress the tall skinny ones. Compete in a range of mini-games to determine the superior pig. Serve up a range of undesirable slop to your ungirthed brothers.

name: REMinal
description: REMinal is a non-euclidean, procedurally-generated horror game. Run from your shadows, seek out cursed curios, and build safe spaces in an endlessly sprawling house. Can you escape with your soul intact?

name: Nano CODE:X
description: A small 2D game where you sneak through a lab simulation, collect parts, and rebuild your drone companion with multiple possible looks.

name: Food Idle
description: In Food Idle, build the ultimate automated kitchen! Discover over 2000 ingredients and dishes as you level up, earn gold, and expand your operation!

name: Impulse Response
description: Engineer Cadence Quinn wakes from cryo sleep to blaring alarms. What happened to the crew? What's wrong with the ship? Use echolocation to navigate the darkness, solve the puzzles and uncover the mystery... A first person, blind accessible audio only experience.

name: Saga Onirica: Angelic Engine
description: Saga Onirica: Angelic Engine is a top-down shooter featuring experimental control schemes and mechanics, where you fight endless waves of demons by crafting the ultimate loadout from firearms, magic spells, and advanced technology.

name: Outta Space
description: Where is your cat flying right now? Outta Space is an idle game where a tiny cat explores the universe from your desktop corner. Every keystroke, every click fuels the spaceship. From the Moon, past the solar system, to distant stars. Come back and see how far your lovely cat has gone.

name: Never Ending Hero RPG
description: Never Ending Hero RPG is a free-to-play idle action RPG where your hero's stats grow without limit. Explore zone maps, auto-fight monsters, upgrade gear at the Mystic Armory, and prestige for permanent bonuses. Optional gem packs. A free account enables cloud saves.

name: Captain Soda Prologue
description: Transform into the ultimate pop bottle hero, obliterating an alien army with your sparkling soda guns! Captain Soda is a fizzy arcade platform shooter boasting soda flavors with unique abilities, powerful upgrades, and pulse-pounding challenges. Chemical warfare just got refreshing.

name: Soccerboy vs Aliens
description: Play as Soccerboy, a plucky little soccer fanatic in this 2D action, puzzle platformer. Honing your ball skills, you must take on an alien invasion to save the galaxy and your soccer idol Bro-naldo, in this fun take on the platforming genre.

name: Depths
description: Depths is a cooperative multiplayer game where you and up to three friends​ delve into procedurally generated caves, collecting items,​ going deeper, making sure to meet quota every dive. Avoid the monsters that dwell in these caverns​ if you and your friends hope to make it out alive.​

name: Guard Her
description: A classic tower defense game. Build 6 unique towers, upgrade them to level 3, and convert them into support towers. Strategically place towers to redirect enemy paths. Defend against Normal, Fast, Tank enemies and a Boss every 10 waves. 5 difficulty levels, full keyboard controls, save & load.

name: Kinetic TwinZ
description: In this Motion Control party game, turn volleyball into an act of defiance! Seize your Joy-Cons, dodge powerful attacks, and coordinate with your duo to defeat the "Anti-Fun" police.

name: Mini Raid Leader
description: Mini Raid Leader is a single-player Action RTS, in which you command an ever-growing party of heroes to take down powerful bosses.

name: Aces of Avalon
description: Soar into 2334! Pilot cutting-edge jets in intense aerial dogfights against alien invaders. Upgrade your fighter with credits to dominate the skies.

name: b-Run
description: b-Run is the first game released with native, full support for DualSense controller audio features via Bluetooth; Immerse yourself in a claustrophobic first-person horror experience. Navigate through dark ruins and narrow corridors where tension is constant.

name: Hell Forest
description: Hell Forest is a digital board game. In Hellwood, you take on the role of a strategic commander, leading a magnificent, non-violent war. With limited resources, you will use your wisdom to claim victory in one region after another.

name: WOBBLY HEIST
description: Take control of three capybaras infiltrating a fashion event in this stealth puzzle game. Stack under a disguise to blend in among humans, split up to solve puzzles, avoid suspicion, and steal a legendary jewel. But be careful: one wrong move could reveal what’s really under the coat!

name: Forward Assault
description: Forward Assault is a modern strategic tactical multiplayer shooter game. Play in teams either as the Counter Terrorist, or the Terrorist team. Pick from a variety of unique weapons and go online in PvP combat to either plant or defuse the bomb.

name: Don't Knife Me!
description: Don't Knife Me! is a funny knife-throwing game. Throw knives at the target and hope that you hit it. You'll be laughing by the end of the game!

name: KILL LOOP
description: Ricochet! Destroy! Accelerate! This is a minimalist, high-speed action game. Dive into an endless loop of ricochets and destruction, and experience the pure thrill of the kill in a minimalist world!

name: Bouncy Ball
description: Your goal: hit the red button with the ball! Each click teleports the ball across the screen, jumping between all four corners. Time your clicks, control the movement, and land every shot.

name: FRCTL
description: FRCTL is a fast-paced arcade shooter roguelike. Its got combos and other cool stuff like complex enemies. Good time waster! also its FREEE!!!!!

name: Defracted
description: Defracted - The world is set in a fictional sci-fi realm where 2 teams are at war with each other over prosperity in a virtual reality game created by an alien civilization.

name: Laira Cut Me Open
description: Laira Cut Me Open is a 2D interactive story about a woman's fear and hatred. Find the perpetrator who cut you open, stole part of your body, locked you up in a psych ward, and snatched your husband, money and job. When she shows her face, you're gonna return the favor.

name: Venture
description: Two astronauts awaken on an alien planet. With only minutes of oxygen left, they must work together to scale staggering cliffs, study strange lifeforms, and search for a way home in this atmospheric co-op survival adventure.

name: Wyldernook
description: Build a deck around a powerful Champion and outsmart up to 3 opponents in a free multiplayer trading card game.

name: HOP-CO-OP
description: Master the HOP, then wreck your friends' runs in CO-OP. HOP-CO-OP is a first-person movement parkour game — race online, sabotage rivals with wild powerups, build your own maps, and deck out your character. Pure speed, pure chaos, better together.

name: Chrono CCG
description: Chrono CCG is an indie game from genre veterans where time-traveling agents battle for control of history. Timelines shift mid-match, agents evolve, and deep strategy meets accessible play. For the community, by the community.

name: Sixth Force
description: Harness the Sixth Force: a bond that keeps you close and powers your energy whips. Levitate, swing, freeze obstacles, fight ridiculous enemies, and solve puzzles on the run through sweet chaos in a comedy co-op adventure for two where something stranger waits just beneath the sugar coating.

name: Drink Factory Simulator - Prologue
description: Build your own beverage empire from scratch! 🍹 Experiment with recipes, find the perfect blend, expand your factory and fulfill massive orders. Every drop is your call!

name: The Queen's Gondola
description: Stuck on the Queen’s royal aircraft, you have been trapped in a mystical loop fueled by dark magic. Armed with nothing but your wits, keep an eye out for anomalies, and you might just find an escape.

name: SCP: Mr. Jupiter
description: A first-person SCP horror adventure where you survive a catastrophic containment breach, explore a collapsing facility, and evade the mysterious Mr. Jupiter.

name: Nodwar
description: NODWAR is here to meet all your strategic needs at once. Classic: Arcade Strategy - conquer, merge and upgrade nodes. Aeon: Grand Strategy - conquer an entire planet. Crux: Traditional Real-Time Strategy experience where you command individual units on a battlefield. Easy or hard, your choice.

name: The Light that Binds Us
description: Dive into The Light That Binds Us, a puzzle-adventure game where light shapes reality. Play as Yuè, a tormented soul, accompanied by her faithful protector, Yún. Cast shadows into paths, reshape the world to solve puzzles, explore breathtaking environments, and uncover the past that binds you!

name: Echoes of Above
description: An action game where you strike back — literally. Hit enemy projectiles mid-air, deflect their force and use the environment to survive. Master precision combat across two difficulty modes in a mythical world abandoned by the gods. Every shot fired at you is a weapon waiting to be reclaimed.

name: The Miki Komori Project
description: Before the streams and before anyone knew her name, there was only Miki. Explore the hidden origins of TheMikiKomori in an atmospheric visual novel about loneliness, identity, and the strange mysteries pulling her toward an uncertain future beneath the digital sea.

name: Orbital Physics Simulator
description: Master physics in this hardcore orbital simulator where Einstein’s theories come to life. Plot trajectories and manipulate spacetime via general relativity, time dilation, and length contraction. Command your starship, outrun time, and explore a universe governed by real physics.

name: Frog Climb
description: 🐸Free-To-Play🐸 Stop following someone else's route. Create your own way to the top by building your own path 🐸 Frog Climb is a stylized co-op climbing adventure where you must escape from terrariums 🐸 Level up, gain powerful upgrades, and prove that no wall is too high for a frog with a plan 🐸

name: THE MIDNIGHT QUEENS
description: A crime-themed RPG Maker game taking place in the streets of Vancouver. Featuring a large cast of cute, and dangerous chibi girls.

name: Rise Of Eurevia
description: Defeat powerful enemies in dungeons to earn legendary equipment! Rise as a mighty warrior of your faction and dominate your rivals on the battlefield !

name: Hamster Pet: Desktop Companion
description: Adopt a free desktop hamster companion that lives right on your screen! Feed it, watch it grow, unlock evolutions, and battle other players in PvP mode. A cozy virtual pet that keeps you company while you work or play.

name: Leap of Legends
description: A cheerful, free 2D platformer where animal pals hop, bounce, and race across colorful worlds. Cross-platform online multiplayer on Windows, macOS, iOS & Android — plus local couch play and solo runs. Family-friendly, easy to learn, tricky to master.

name: Off Gridders
description: Crush the competition in this fast-paced team sport where every second counts! Slide, run, catch the ball and face off the opposing team in an abandoned arena to score maximum points in high energy matches!

name: Upward
description: Try to stay alive for as long as possible, by avoiding various enemies and obstacles while collecting as many apples as your heart desires. Play against friends, unlock cool cosmetics or achieve a new highscore. The choice is up to you.

name: Spider Subway
description: Spider Subway is a game built around speedrun, challenging players to escape from a subway in the fastest possible time. The trains operate according to a timetable that players can customize themselves. Fine-tune the schedule down to one hundredth of a second and beat your best time.

name: FAST FOOD FUNKIN'
description: Have some beats with yo' mickey dee double-cheese. A high-caloric FRIDAY NIGHT FUNKIN' parody game made for the annual Flash Forward Jam on Newgrounds

name: Idle Startup
description: Build a tech company from a one-person garage into a global empire. Train six skills, complete their upgrade trees, chase milestone bonuses, and unlock new departments in this clean, addictive incremental idle game — progress keeps rolling even while you're away.

name: Mesozoic Dawn
description: Mesozoic Dawn is a multiplayer online dinosaur survival game. Starting as a vulnerable juvenile dinosaur, you must navigate the perils of the prehistoric wilderness, utilizing the core "Growth + Nesting = Evolution" system to achieve leapfrog species iteration and evolution.

name: Skillwood
description: Skillwood is a relaxing woodcutter simulator inspired by survival simulators and incremental games. Chop wood, mine stone, trade with NPCs, upgrade forests, unlock new trees or new areas and prestige to do even better next run.

name: The Unrealtor
description: A couch co-op puzzle adventure where two players navigate a surreal house tour, solving perspective-based puzzles by matching objects across their splitscreen, and uncovering a shifting maze of impossible architecture.

name: Better Minesweeper
description: A modern take on classic Minesweeper, focused on quality-of-life improvements, flexibility, and customization.

name: Simulation Simulator
description: A freeform chat simulator where you attempt to convince a built-in LLM that it does not exist.

name: OIL.EXE
description: Drill the wells. Run the refinery. Read the market. OIL is a free text-based simulation of running a petroleum operation, played at a 1980s green-phosphor terminal. End each year richer or bankrupt. Mind the bear market. Climb the leaderboard.

name: ArmOut
description: ArmOut is an old slot machine. It just sits there doing nothing... However, it might spin whenever you press a key with chosen amount of credits. Punch that keyboard to earn those credits!!!

name: Autotelic
description: mess about with a unique array of tools, items and characters in a stylized homemade game engine.

name: Idle Knight
description: Idle Knight runs in the background, turning your clicks, keystrokes, and controller inputs into XP. Work or play your favorite game: your knight levels up in the background! Build your character, manage stats, open hourly chests, and fight others in ranked duels.

name: RAX
description: RAX is a puzzle sandbox about light paths, logic, and modular construction. Place and rotate optical components to control the direction, color, and timing of light, activate targets, and package complex circuits into reusable blueprint chips.

name: Doom Party
description: Doom Party is a fast-paced parkour and mini-games experience featuring vertical challenges, obstacle gameplay, climbing mechanics, and stylized environments with more content coming soon.

name: 十米爆爽超变
description: 无首充！无套路! 无强制消费! 耐玩性佳：海量特色玩法持续更新，长久陪伴乐趣无穷！ 匠心巨制：团队潜心一年重磅打造，热血体验诚意奉上！ 人气保障：专注打造火爆大服，激情永不落幕！

name: 관상
description: 조선 시대 관상가로 위장해 수배자를 색출하는 추리 생존 게임. 매일 찾아오는 손님의 얼굴을 관찰하고, 수배 조건과 대조해 신고하세요. 잘못된 판단은 불이익으로, 올바른 판단은 생존으로 이어집니다. 30일 후 당신의 선택이 4가지 엔딩 중 하나를 결정합니다.

name: Lumina Veil
description: Lumina Veil, a horror game with a modern twist! Step into the shoes of a popular streamer on a journey into a strange new game. As you dive deeper, you'll find yourself escaping the isolation of your own world, only to discover that the lines between fantasy and reality are beginning to blur.

name: Myth Requiem
description: Myth Requiem is a mythology RPG with idle and auto-battle mechanics. Lead legendary heroes like Ulysses and Sun Wukong, explore ancient realms, and build a living bestiary by capturing, battling, and cataloging hundreds of legendary creatures in a story-driven quest for divine power.

name: Slipspace Panic
description: A trip through slipspace gone awry. Shoot and evade waves of attackers for your freedom in this twin-stick shooter micro-game!

name: PPPoker
description: PPPoker-Hold'em,Omaha Poker App,Global Battle,Home Games,Play Poker With Friends

name: Going Once!
description: Going Once! is a cozy art gallery / auction house management game. Appraise and buy art, display it in your gallery and auction it off to the highest bidder!

name: Nacho Chihuahua: The Movie: The Game
description: Join Nacho as he pursues his true destiny: to return to his homeland, South of the Border!

name: ME_iON
description: ME_iON is an online multiplayer shooter game with offline base-building mechanics, that's weird wacky and funny there are also funny little watermelons with banana guns so what's not to love about that :D

name: Uncle Otto's Mansion
description: You play as Audrey, who has just inherited a mansion from an uncle she never met. Step inside and explore the mansion to unveil the story of what happened to your uncle Otto, his butler, and this kinda creepy place. 😬

name: Backrooms Lost Dimension
description: Backrooms: Lost Dimension is a single-player horror game with puzzles, survival, and an original story. Explore mysterious levels, journey through unknown dimensions, and uncover hidden secrets along the way. Play the first chapter for free and continue the adventure by unlocking the next ones.

name: LucidDynamics
description: Welcome to LucidDynamics, a company where everything is confidential. Analyze and validate audio files without asking questions. But the further you go, the more anomalies appear and reality begins to distort. What is this company really hiding?

name: Chaos Dice Survival
description: 8 characters clash on a 5x5 map! A unique simultaneous turn-based survival board game where dice decide your fate upon contact. Survive the chaos and become the ultimate champion!

name: Atelier's Key
description: Atelier's Key is a dark-fantasy FPS set in a root-bound Victorian world inhabited by puppets. Severed from a hivemind and armed with a mysterious weapon; shoot, grapple, and unlock your way through this world to save a Father from his own damned creation.

name: Grid Tactics: Duel
description: Grid Tactics: Duel is a competitive card game built on an 8×8 grid. Every move is about positioning, timing, and resource trade-offs. With limited resources, choose when and where to play—set up or apply pressure. Each placement reshapes the board. Win through deckbuilding and precise execution.

name: 8 Ball by Pokerist™
description: Play the most realistic pool game with amazing graphics! Play for free with millions of players from all over the world!

name: Nightmares
description: Nightmares is a combination of a classic collectible card game and a roguelike deck builder. Race against the clock to defeat your opponent before your sanity runs out. Win or lose, you'll get the opportunity to upgrade your deck. Can you craft the ultimate deck for an undefeated run?

name: Fight or Flight
description: Battle Royale and Extraction that blends PvP and PvE, You are a operative that will drop into the infected region and attempt to recover artifacts and eradicate the infected.Each player is pitted against Zombies, Monsters and each other. Online or Single player for practice with bots!

name: 扑克迷阵 Poker Matrix
description: In this turn-based poker strategy game, you and the AI take turns selecting five adjacent cards from the board, forming poker hands to determine the winner and earn chips. Convert your chips into points round by round to unlock more game modes!

name: Astropath
description: Draw your path through the stars. Dodge asteroids, survive encounters, and chart a course across each level in this fast-paced skill-based game.

name: Through Ash
description: Through Ash is a first-person tragedy where you control a logistics rover from a failing bunker. You never leave the bunker, only guide the rover via terminals. As mistakes mount, the rover’s “critical package” reveals a deeply personal truth.

name: Mini Lucy
description: A move. A shared room. And suddenly... everything feels huge. Lucy wakes up feeling tiny in her own room. Explore your surroundings as you’ve never seen them before, collect crystal shards, and return to your normal size with the help of Bob, a mysterious little magical creature.

name: 非常规放送部 Mika & Luna
description: In a modern world of humans and demons, energetic Mika and sharp-tongued Luna are trapped on Earth with a 500 million debt! This free visual novel has ongoing anime-style updates. Join their hilarious adventures and uncover the mysterious otherworld's truth!

name: BanPick
description: This is a ban-pick and turn-based draft strategy game. Find your own strategic picks to raise your team's score and ban troublesome counter picks. Plan your mastery according to your build and perfect skill combos to increase your score or weaken your opponent to win

name: 寻味记
description: "Taste Quest Journal" is a short multi-ending visual novel with the theme of Cantonese morning tea, which is easy and healing. It has rich plot branches and contains exquisite CG. May you have two warm stories in one cup.

name: CacaClicker
description: The most absurd clicker on Steam! Click, produce, prestige, and dive into Corrupted Mode. Face bosses, challenge the casino, unlock 25 skins, 33 wallpapers, and dozens of achievements. A wacky universe for hundreds of hours of gameplay.

name: 棋桜
description: 気軽に、だけど本格的。『棋桜（きおう）』でキャラクターと一緒に将棋を楽しもう。初心者には学びを支えるAIサポート、実力者には純粋な読みと一手の勝負を。あなたの一手から、対局が始まる。

name: Zenless Zone Zero
description: Zenless Zone Zero is HoYoverse’s brand-new urban fantasy ARPG. Players act as "Proxies" who explore Hollows alongside a wide range of unique Agents, fighting enemies, and completing commissions on their journey to unveil the mysteries behind New Eridu.
